prompt.description: Text description of the video content to generate.

mode.description: Quality mode. RESOLUTION_720 for 720p, RESOLUTION_1080 for 1080p.

width.description: Video width in pixels. Must match a supported dimension pair.

height.description: Video height in pixels. Must match a supported dimension pair.

motion_has_audio.description: Whether to generate audio for the video.

public.description: Whether the generated video is public.

guidances.start_frame.description: Start frame image. Cannot coexist with image_reference.

guidances.end_frame.description: End frame image. Requires start_frame. Cannot coexist with image_reference.

guidances.image_reference.description: Reference images for style/content guidance. Cannot coexist with start_frame or end_frame.

rules: DO NOT set style — not available for video models.
DO NOT set negativePrompt — not available for this model.
DO NOT set prompt_enhance — not available for this model.
DO NOT set quality — use mode instead (RESOLUTION_720 or RESOLUTION_1080).
MUTUAL EXCLUSION: image_reference AND start_frame/end_frame CANNOT coexist. Pick one or the other.
end_frame REQUIRES start_frame — cannot use end_frame alone.
start_frame and end_frame together = image-to-video with start and end frame.
When start_frame is set and width/height are omitted, dimensions auto-match the start_frame image.
3 aspect ratios × 2 resolutions = 6 valid dimension combos.
motion_has_audio: set true for music videos, false for silent/dramatic content.
Default mode is RESOLUTION_1080 (1080p). Use 720p only for fast previews.
